startMessage:
Hello! I'm a weather forecast bot. 

You can use me inline by typing the city name. Try typing `@climatologiabot name of your city` in any conversation. 

You can also click on the buttons below for support or access another bot:
language_set:
Your language has been set to English 🇺🇸

Type /start again
